body: .pdp-openBox-condition-tiles{.condition-tile{border-radius:8px;width:110px;&.available{&:hover{border:1px solid #2b5df5}&.selected{border:2px solid #0046be}&:focus{border:2px solid #2b5df5}}&.unavailable{background-color:#f0f2f4;&:hover{border:1px solid #90959e}&.selected{border:2px solid #70757d}&:focus{border:2px solid #90959e}}}}
